memoryArtifacts.headline: Othon IV de Bourgogne (1248-1303)
memoryArtifacts.description:
Otton IV de Bourgogne (avant 1248- † 1303) comte palatin de Bourgogne et comte d'Artois par mariage avec la comtesse Mathilde d'Artois dite « Mahaut d'Artois ».

Il est l'avant-dernier comte de Bourgo …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Otto IV Count of Burgundy於1248年出生在法國福朗-可特艾度布斯奧南斯時，他的父親Hughes de Chalons28歲，母親Adelaide de Bourgogne I28歲。他於1271年與Philippa de Bar結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1302年3月17日在法國布格享年54歲，埋葬在法國o-阿爾培斯易瑟艾傑利額。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Otto IV Count of Burgundy于1248年出生在法国福朗-可特艾度布斯奧南斯时，他的父亲Hughes de Chalons28岁，母亲Adelaide de Bourgogne I28岁。他于1271年与Philippa de Bar结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1302年3月17日在法国布格享年54岁，埋葬在法国o-阿爾培斯易瑟艾傑利額。

nameMeanings.name: Otto
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a short form of any of the various Germanic compound personal names containing the element od, ot ‘prosperity, wealth’ ( compare the corresponding Old English ēad in names such as Edward and Edwin ). St Otto of Bamberg ( d. 1139 ) was a missionary to the Pomeranians. Otto the Great ( 912–73 ) is generally regarded as the founder of the Holy Roman Empire, and the name has been borne by several members of German and Austrian royal houses. It was recorded occasionally among immigrants to England from the Low Countries in the 14th century, but failed to establish itself. Since the 19th century it has again been used occasionally in the English-speaking world, mostly among immigrants from Germanic countries.

nameMeanings.name: IV
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Otto IV Count of Burgundy was born in 1248, in Ornans, Doubs, Franche-Comté, France, his father, Hughes de Chalons, was 28 and his mother, Adelaide de Bourgogne I, was 28. He married Philippa de Bar in 1271. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 17 March 1302, in Burgundy, France, at the age of 54, and was buried in Cherlieu, Isère, Rhône-Alpes, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Otto IV Count of Burgundy est né en 1248, à Ornans, Doubs, Franche-Comté, France, son père, Hughes de Chalons, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Adelaide de Bourgogne I, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Philippa de Bar en 1271. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 17 mars 1302, à Bourgogne, France, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterré à Cherlieu, Isère, Rhône-Alpes, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Otto IV Count of Burgundy 1248 in Ornans, Doubs, Franche-Comté, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hughes de Chalons 28 und seine Mutter Adelaide de Bourgogne I 28. Er hat 1271 Philippa de Bar geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 17. März 1302 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Burgund, Frankreich und wurde in Cherlieu, Isère, Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Otto IV Count of Burgundy è nato il nel 1248 nel Ornans, Doubs, Franche-Comté, Francia, il suo padre, Hughes de Chalons, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Adelaide de Bourgogne I, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Philippa de Bar nel 1271. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 17 marzo 1302, nel Bourgogne, Francia, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolto a Cherlieu, Isère, Rhône-Alpes, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Otto IV Count of Burgundyが1248年にフランスフランチェ-コムトeドウブズオルナンスで生まれた時，父Hughes de Chalonsは28歳，母Adelaide de Bourgogne Iは28歳であった。1271年にPhilippa de Barと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1302年3月17日にフランスボウルゴグンで54歳で死去し，フランスルhoネ-アルペスイスeアチェルリーウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Otto IV Count of Burgundy(이)가 1248년 프랑스 프랭체-코트e 다브스 른아스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hughes de Chalons(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Adelaide de Bourgogne I(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1271년 Philippa de Bar(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1302년 3월 17일 프랑스 부르고그니에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 ho니-알프스 이스e르 체를리외에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Otto IV Count of Burgundy nasceu em 1248, em Ornans, Doubs, Franche-Comté, França, seu pai, Hughes de Chalons, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Adelaide de Bourgogne I, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Philippa de Bar em 1271. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 17 de março de 1302, em Bourgogne, França, com 54 anos, e foi sepultado em Cherlieu, Isère, Rhône-Alpes, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Otto IV Count of Burgundy родился в 1248 г. в местности орнанс, доубс, фрэнче-комтe, Франция, его отцу по имени Hughes de Chalons было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Adelaide de Bourgogne I, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Philippa de Bar в 1271 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 17 марта 1302 г. в местности бургогн, Франция в возрасте 54 лет и был похоронен в местности чирлиеу, исeр, рoне-алпесь, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Otto IV Count of Burgundy nació en 1248, en Ornans, Doubs, Franche-Comté, Francia, su papá, Hughes de Chalons, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Adelaide de Bourgogne I, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Philippa de Bar en 1271. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 17 de marzo de 1302, en Bourgogne, Francia, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultado en Cherlieu, Isère, Rhône-Alpes, Francia.
